'''Gala''' was a beautiful and wealthy world at one point ruled by the [[Beju-Tallah dynasty]]. It was fairly close to [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]].

==History==
The [[Galacian]]s native to the planet were divided into three adversarial tribes: the [[city people]], the [[sea people]], and the [[hill people]]. After the death of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cana]], [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]] realized that the monarchy was growing weaker, and that the people wanted democratic elections. She relented, and held an [[Galacian Gubernatorial election, 44 BBY|election]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were [[Mission to Gala|sent]] to help the elections run smoothly. They foiled a plot by [[Lonnag Giba]], head of the [[Council of Ministers]], to seize control of the government. [[Wila Prammi]] was elected first [[Governor/Legends|Governor]].<ref name="The Mark of the Crown" />

The local defense force used [[Galan starfighter]]s. Such a fighter was given to Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]''</ref>
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was located within [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space.<ref name="Atlas" />

{{Planet-stub}}
